message:
🐛 Fix tour tooltip positioning for left/right placements

The tooltip was applying -translate-x-1/2 unconditionally, which
caused the tooltip to be pushed off-screen when using 'right'
CSS positioning (for left placement steps like the snoozed section).

Now only applies horizontal centering for top/bottom placements,
and vertical centering for left/right placements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
